mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_course WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND course_id = #{courseId}
SELECT * FROM user_course WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT * FROM user_course WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 AND progress < 100 ORDER BY last_learn_time DESC
SELECT * FROM user_course WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 AND progress = 100 ORDER BY updated_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE user_course SET status = 1, order_id = #{orderId}, purchase_time = NOW(), last_learn_time = NOW(), updated_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND course_id = #{courseId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_course WHERE status = 1 AND expire_time < NOW()
mapper.update:
UPDATE user_course SET status = #{status}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
